scope.target: AI context version and release governance

steps: Define immutable tag and release lifecycle
execution.last_completed_step: Defined SemVer and immutable publication rules and created retrospective release records, notes, and migration guides for v0.1.0 and v0.2.0.

results.summary: Framework versions now have stable REL IDs, exact tag and commit identity, compatibility declarations, migration guidance, and an explicit publication gate.
tests_run: PyYAML parse of two release records
Exact v0.1.0 and v0.2.0 tag target verification
results.residual_risk: The records are retrospective and v0.2.0 predates automated upgrade/provenance support.
